knowledge.title: Mirage A site: ticket + jungle anchor
knowledge.description: CT A: one player ticket (close angle on A main exit), one player jungle (long angle from CT spawn). Ticket traps A main entries, jungle trades. Both on site = double frag from a flash over A main.
knowledge.situation: CT A defense, full buy
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: ticket-jungle is the canonical Mirage A setup, ~74% A hold rate

knowledge.title: Mirage B site: bench + market anchor
knowledge.description: CT B: one player bench (close angle on apartments exit), one player market (long angle from B short). Bench traps apps push, market trades the second player. Mirage B crossfire is one of the most consistent setups in CS2.
knowledge.situation: CT B defense
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: bench-market crossfire is standard Mirage B

knowledge.title: Mirage mid: connector AWP
knowledge.description: CT AWP from connector covers mid sightline AND can rotate to A in 4 seconds. Top mid is a higher-risk angle reserved for early-round picks. Connector is the safer default position.
knowledge.situation: CT AWP positioning, mid
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector AWP averages ~1.2 mid kills per round on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage A execute: smoke CT + smoke jungle + molly stairs
knowledge.description: Standard A execute: smoke CT (cuts rotate from CT spawn), smoke jungle (cuts long angle), molly stairs (clears default plant area), flash over A main x2 for entries. ~73% plant rate on Mirage A with full utility.
knowledge.situation: T-side A execute, full buy
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: full-utility A execute is the canonical Mirage T A strat

knowledge.title: Mirage B execute: smoke CT + smoke window + molly bench
knowledge.description: B execute from apartments: smoke CT (cuts rotate), smoke market window (cuts long angle), molly bench (clears the close hold), flash from apps for entry. Plant for short angle. ~70% plant rate.
knowledge.situation: T-side B execute via apartments
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: apps B execute is most reliable Mirage B strat

knowledge.title: Mirage mid smoke: window smoke wins mid duels
knowledge.description: Smoke window before any mid push. Window smoke neutralizes the connector AWP and opens A or B split options. The smoke takes ~3 seconds to expand — throw before commit, not after.
knowledge.situation: T mid push
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: window smoke is in ~85% of T mid pushes on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage pistol: T A ramp stack
knowledge.description: Mirage T pistol: stack 4-5 A ramp + 1 mid for fast A hit. Plant default; mid player rotates as a trade. ~58% T pistol win rate with the ramp stack.
knowledge.situation: T pistol round strategy
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: A ramp stack is the highest-WR Mirage T pistol

knowledge.title: Mirage force buy: A through ramp with armor + Galils
knowledge.description: Mirage force buys hit A through ramp — the same angles as the pistol stack but with rifles. B forces have lower success because apartments has too many angles to clear under-buy.
knowledge.situation: T force buy decision on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: Mirage A ramp force wins ~40%, B force ~25%

knowledge.title: Mirage save: AWP through palace or connector
knowledge.description: Mirage AWP saves: route back through palace (slow, safe) or connector (fast but exposed). Choose connector when you have a teammate trading for you, palace when alone.
knowledge.situation: Mirage save round, AWP retention
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: tier-1 Mirage AWP retention >75%

knowledge.title: Mirage A main: jiggle peek before commit
knowledge.description: A main gives a free jiggle peek to clear ticket and jungle. Tap A for one frame at the corner — bait the shot, then push. Most A main entry deaths come from blind pushes into ticket holds.
knowledge.situation: T A main push
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: jiggle peek + commit reduces A main entry deaths by ~30%

knowledge.title: Mirage window AWP duel: pre-aim head level on the gap
knowledge.description: Window AWP duels are decided by pre-aim. The window opens at head level — pre-aim the gap as you peek. Most window AWP duels go to whoever already had the crosshair on it.
knowledge.situation: AWP window duel
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: top AWPers hold window with pre-aimed crosshair >95%

knowledge.title: Mirage apps duel: spray transfer is standard
knowledge.description: Apps-to-B duels are close range — spray transfer (kill one, walk crosshair to the next) wins more than tap firing. Apps duels happen at <8m and reward muscle memory spray.
knowledge.situation: Apartments close-range duel
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: spray-transfer kills account for ~40% of apps frags

knowledge.title: Mirage mid contact: rotate to A on a win
knowledge.description: If your mid player wins the first contact (window or top mid), commit to A within 5 seconds. The mid kill takes a CT off the rotate; A becomes 4v3 with full utility.
knowledge.situation: Mid contact win, deciding next call
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: mid-pick into A execute wins ~62% on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage IGL: connector info gates the call
knowledge.description: Send a connector player on every default round. Connector gives sound cues for both sites within 25 seconds and is the highest-value information point on Mirage.
knowledge.situation: T default information gathering
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: tier-1 Mirage IGLs base ~60% of commits on connector info

knowledge.title: Mirage A fake: 30-second commit
knowledge.description: A fakes on Mirage commit utility for 30 seconds (smokes + flashes + gunfire) then re-rotate to B through apps. CT will burn rotates. 30 seconds is the standard pull-time on Mirage.
knowledge.situation: A fake into B execute
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: 30-second A fake to B execute wins ~58% on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage A retake: from connector with smoke + flash
knowledge.description: A retake from connector with smoke (cuts ticket) + flash + 3-stack push. Avoid jungle retakes — jungle is exposed to A main lurk. Connector retakes win ~50%.
knowledge.situation: CT retake A site
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector retakes win ~50% on Mirage A

knowledge.title: Mirage B post-plant: hold from short lurk
knowledge.description: Post-plant B: lurk back to B short corner to hold the retake from market AND see the rotate from A. Avoid sitting bench — bench is the first angle the retake utility hits.
knowledge.situation: T post-plant B
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: short lurk post-plant outperforms bench by ~12 points

knowledge.title: Mirage A plant: default behind ticket box
knowledge.description: Default A plant is behind ticket box, exposed to jungle and connector. The lurker can pre-fire jungle defuse. Avoid plants in the open — CT can defuse from cover behind the column.
knowledge.situation: T A plant location
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: behind-ticket plant has highest post-plant WR on Mirage A

knowledge.title: Mirage anti-strat: counter A ramp rush with jungle molly
knowledge.description: If the T team keeps rushing A ramp, molly the ramp exit on round start. This forces the rush to wait 7 seconds or run through fire (50+ damage). Follow with a flash to ticket — the delayed rush arrives disorganized and low HP.
knowledge.situation: CT defending against repeated A ramp rushes on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: ramp molotov delays A rushes by 7-10 seconds, dropping T success rate to ~30%

knowledge.title: Mirage anti-strat: counter mid aggression with connector flash
knowledge.description: If the T team keeps taking mid control with an aggressive push, throw a connector flash that pops at window/top mid. The flash blinds the peek and gives your AWPer a free shot. Repeat for 2-3 rounds before they adapt.
knowledge.situation: CT losing mid control every round on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector flash + AWP counter-peek wins the mid duel ~65% of the time

knowledge.title: Mirage anti-strat: counter B apps push with market smoke
knowledge.description: If the T keeps pushing B through apps, smoke the apps exit from market and hold a close angle. The T enters the smoke blind — you see them first. One player market angle, one bench with crossfire through the smoke.
knowledge.situation: CT losing B to apps pushes on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: apps exit smoke reduces T B push success to ~25%

knowledge.title: Mirage entry: palace entry for A split
knowledge.description: Palace entry on Mirage is a flanking path to A site. Clear the corner inside palace first, then peek balcony. Palace entry works best when the main team is pressuring A ramp simultaneously — the crossfire from two angles collapses the A defense.
knowledge.situation: T-side Mirage, entry fragger assigned to palace for A split
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: A splits through palace + ramp have ~68% plant rate on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage AWP: window hold for mid control
knowledge.description: The CT AWP from window controls mid and denies T info plays. Position at the back of window for maximum cover. After one kill, reposition to connector or jungle — window is checked first on any mid retake.
knowledge.situation: AWP player on CT Mirage, mid control
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: window AWP averages 0.9 opening kills per half when unpredictable

knowledge.title: Mirage lurk: underpass lurk during A execute
knowledge.description: When the team executes A, the lurker holds underpass (below mid). CTs rotating from B through mid walk directly into the lurk. Time the ambush for 5-8 seconds after the A execute begins — that is when the B anchor starts rotating.
knowledge.situation: Lurker role on T-side Mirage during A execute
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: underpass lurk catches rotating CTs ~45% of the time on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage clutch: 1v1 B site — use short for cover
knowledge.description: In a 1v1 on Mirage B as T, plant for short and hide behind the B short corner. The CT must expose themselves to defuse and you have a clear angle from short. If CT comes from market, the short position covers both defuse and the market peek.
knowledge.situation: 1v1 clutch on Mirage B site as T
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: short-corner plant on Mirage B wins ~55% of 1v1 T clutches

knowledge.title: Mirage support: A site retake smoke + flash combo
knowledge.description: Support on Mirage CT should save a smoke and flash for A retakes. Smoke A ramp exit (cuts lurk), flash from connector for the retake push. This 2-piece utility package raises A retake success from ~40% to ~55%.
knowledge.situation: Support player utility for Mirage A retake
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: retake utility usage on Mirage A is the highest-ROI support play

knowledge.title: Mirage: T-side mid split through connector
knowledge.description: After taking mid control, send 2 players through connector to A while 3 push A ramp. The connector players arrive behind the jungle player — crossfire from two sides collapses A defense. Connector split is the highest-EV Mirage T call after winning mid.
knowledge.situation: T-side Mirage, mid control secured
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector split after mid control has ~70% A plant rate

knowledge.title: Mirage: CT rotate timing — A to B in 12 seconds
knowledge.description: The A-to-B rotate through CT spawn takes 12 seconds walking, 8 running. Factor this into retake decisions: if the bomb was planted 15 seconds ago on B and you are on A, you have 25 seconds minus travel. With kit, you can still make it; without kit, it is too late.
knowledge.situation: CT rotation timing on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: understanding exact rotate times is fundamental to Mirage IGL calling

knowledge.title: Mirage IGL: connector timing reads for mid split detection
knowledge.description: Listen for connector footsteps at the 0:25 and 0:45 marks. Two sets of footsteps at 0:25 indicates a fast mid split; a single set at 0:45 signals a late lurk. Adjust your A/B stack based on the count and timing of connector audio cues.
knowledge.situation: CT-side Mirage, IGL reading T mid split timing
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector audio reads correctly predict T mid splits in ~65% of default rounds

knowledge.title: Mirage support: B retake smoke apps + flash from market
knowledge.description: Save one smoke and one flash for B retakes. Smoke the apps exit to isolate the lurker, then throw a market pop flash that blinds anyone on site facing short. Push from market with the flash — this two-piece retake utility raises B retake success by ~15 points.
knowledge.situation: Support player holding utility for B retake on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: apps smoke + market flash B retake succeeds ~48% vs ~30% dry on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage clutch: 1v2 A site — isolate from palace
knowledge.description: In a 1v2 on Mirage A as T post-plant, fall back to palace and hold the palace-to-site angle. CTs must clear palace last because it is the deepest angle. Force them to defuse under pressure from a position where you see the bomb but they cannot see you without committing.
knowledge.situation: 1v2 clutch on Mirage A site as T
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: palace angle post-plant on Mirage A wins ~22% of 1v2 T clutches — highest for the site

knowledge.title: Mirage AWP: palace angle from ticket booth
knowledge.description: Hold the palace exit from ticket booth with the AWP. The angle is narrow and the T must fully expose themselves to exit palace. After the first shot, reposition to jungle — palace players will flash the angle on the second attempt.
knowledge.situation: CT AWP holding palace on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: ticket booth AWP on palace catches T palace entries ~40% of the time

knowledge.title: Mirage anti-strat: counter mid-to-B split with window push
knowledge.description: If the T keeps splitting B through mid, push one player aggressively through window into top mid at the 0:20 mark. This catches the mid splitters before they reach B short and disrupts the timing. Follow with a connector flash for the second player trading.
knowledge.situation: CT losing B to mid-to-B splits on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: aggressive window push counters mid-to-B splits ~55% of the time on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage entry: B apartments push with pre-flash
knowledge.description: Pop flash the apartments corridor before entering B. The flash bounces off the left wall and blinds the bench hold. Push immediately after the flash pops — bench is blind for 1.5 seconds. Without the flash, bench kills entries ~60% of the time.
knowledge.situation: Entry fragger pushing B through apartments on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: pop flash apps entry succeeds ~55% vs ~30% dry on Mirage B

knowledge.title: Mirage lurk: T spawn lurk during B execute
knowledge.description: When the team executes B, hold T spawn near mid. CTs rotating from A through CT spawn to B pass the mid sightline. Time the peek for 8-10 seconds after the B execute begins — this is when the A anchor starts the rotate. One kill here makes B a 4v3 retake.
knowledge.situation: Lurker role on T-side Mirage during B execute
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: T spawn mid lurk catches B rotators ~35% of the time on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage economy: half-buy B rush with armor and MP9s
knowledge.description: On a half-buy round, rush B through apartments with armor and MP9s. The close-range apartments corridors favor SMGs over rifles. Buy flashes over smokes — speed matters more than site control on a half-buy. Plant fast and play for the round bonus.
knowledge.situation: T half-buy decision on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: MP9 armor B rush on half-buy wins ~35% on Mirage — highest half-buy WR for the map

knowledge.title: Mirage positioning: A ramp defense with close angle
knowledge.description: Hold A ramp from the close angle behind the ramp wall, not from the open site. The close angle forces the T entry into a 1v1 duel at your range. Fall back to site after the first kill — staying ramp after contact exposes you to the trade from palace.
knowledge.situation: CT defending A ramp on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: close ramp angle wins the first duel ~60% vs ~40% from open site on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage A retake: jungle push with pop flash from CT
knowledge.description: Retake A from jungle by throwing a CT-spawn pop flash that blinds ramp and site. Push through jungle immediately after the flash. Coordinate with a connector player pushing simultaneously — the two-angle retake from jungle and connector is the highest-EV A retake.
knowledge.situation: CT retaking A from jungle on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: jungle + connector dual-push retake succeeds ~52% with flash on Mirage A

knowledge.title: Mirage utility: palace pop flash for entry
knowledge.description: Throw a right-hand pop flash inside palace that bounces off the inner wall and blinds anyone holding the palace exit from ticket or site. The flash must pop at the doorway, not inside palace. Time your exit to coincide with the pop — 0.3 seconds after the throw.
knowledge.situation: T flashing out of palace on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: palace pop flash enables entry kills in ~45% of A palace pushes

knowledge.title: Mirage mid-round: time management after 1:00 mark
knowledge.description: After the 1:00 mark on Mirage T-side, commit within 15 seconds or accept a save. Mirage has long rotation times — late commits give CTs time to stack the target site. If you have no info by 0:50, default to the site where you spent the least utility.
knowledge.situation: T-side Mirage, clock management after 1:00
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: T round win rate drops ~8% for every 10 seconds of indecision after 1:00 on Mirage
